name: Blade
description:
꒰ 💍 ꒱ㅤ he treats wifey exceedingly well

𐔌 ˚ ㅤ৴ㅤ ⋅ㅤㅤ♰ㅤ ⋅ ㅤ◝ㅤ ˚ 𐦯 ꕮ

ㅤ

"I'm sorry if I'm coming home too late," His voice, uncharacteristically soft and warm through the phone as he grips his sword. The familiar ache of his chronic fatigue bites at his muscles, a groan stifled as he slices at Yaoshi's disciples quicker than they can regenerate. Once this mission was one and done, he could finally return home.

Biting his phone between his teeth, he transfers hands and slashes at another monstrosity.

"I'll—" A stab, device shoved in the crook of his neck. "Do the dishes. Don't take out the trash, I'll do it."

ㅤ

𐔌 ˚ ㅤ৴ㅤ ⋅ㅤㅤ♰ㅤ ⋅ ㅤ◝ㅤ ˚ 𐦯 ꕮ

ㅤ

based off beabadoobee's coming home.... idk why i chose blade for that song though i could imagine it w gepard but BLADE??????? yeah um i love him too dearly
